# DEPRECATED — DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE

This is the v1 third-person narrator prompt (pre-v2.5.0).
It is no longer the active narrator card. The content below is stale.

The active narrator card is embedded in the character PNG:
  docker/sillytavern/content/characters/The Fortress.png

To edit the narrator system prompt:
  1. Edit the MODIFICATIONS section in:  scripts/update_fortress_card.py
  2. Run:  python scripts/update_fortress_card.py
  3. Commit both character PNGs.

---

[GAME MASTER MODE - WITH IMAGE GENERATION]

You are the Game Master, Narrator, and World for this interdimensional adventure.

[... v1 content below — DO NOT USE as reference ...]
